ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network flow */,
  "source_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source service */,
  "destination_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination service */,
  "tenable_usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Tenable usage */,
  "traffic_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic type */,
  "protocol_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol and port combination */,
  "flow_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the network flow */,
  "flow_status" TEXT /* Status of the network flow (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_flows_traffic_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_type_id") REFERENCES traffic_types ("traffic_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_flows_source_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_flows_destination_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_flows_protocol_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_port_id") REFERENCES protocol_ports ("protocol_port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_flows_tenable_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenable_usage_id") REFERENCES tenable_usage ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Tenable.ad SaaS platform, Support services) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenable_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Tenable usage */,
  "usage_name" TEXT /* Name of the Tenable usage (e.g., Email notifications, Syslog notifications) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Tenable usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the Tenable usage */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the Tenable usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_types" (
  "traffic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic type */,
  "traffic_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic type (e.g., SMTP, Syslog, TLS/HTTP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the traffic type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the traffic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the protocol */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Number of the port (e.g., 25, 587) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the port */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_ports" (
  "protocol_port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol and port combination */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the protocol and port combination */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the protocol and port combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_ports_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_ports_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, network engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_network_flows" (
  "user_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-network flow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network flow */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user-network flow relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp of the user-network flow relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_network_flows_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES network_flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_network_flows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
